description: I am a software engineer with a strong foundation in building scalable backend services and a growing expertise in full-stack development. My background includes developing high-performance systems for a major aerospace company and contributing to projects involving intelligent text processing and real-time object detection.

With a Master's degree focusing on Computer Science from the University at Buffalo, I bring academic rigor in areas like Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Computer Vision to practical engineering challenges. I combine this with hands-on experience in Python, Flask, React, and various AWS services to deliver end-to-end solutions.

Throughout my career, I have demonstrated a commitment to system reliability, performance optimization, and robust CI/CD practices. I am adept at owning the entire system design lifecycle, from initial architecture to production deployment and monitoring.

Outside of engineering, I enjoy activities that combine discipline, curiosity, and continuous learning. As an avid cricket enthusiast and wicketkeeper-batsman, I value teamwork, focus, and adaptability both on and off the field. I also enjoy traveling, working out, and exploring new cuisines through cooking. Beyond these interests, I regularly engage with content on history and psychology, and enjoy watching films, television series.

description: Relevant Coursework: Distributed Systems, Computer Organization, Data Analytics, Web Technologies
Designed and deployed Flask-based microservices integrating NLP pipelines for intelligent text processing, with MongoDB for scalable data storage
Built and documented RESTful APIs consumed by React-Redux clients, ensuring seamless data flow across services
Enhanced CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Dockerized containers, reducing manual deployment effort by 60%
Owned system design decisions from architecture through production rollout, focusing on fault tolerance and observability
Architected and developed scalable backend services in Python (Flask) with MySQL and MongoDB, serving 20+ cross-functional teams and processing 5M+ records monthly
Improved API latency through query optimization, distributed caching, and asynchronous processing
Collaborated with DevOps to containerize services using Docker and integrated CI/CD pipelines across staging and prod
Owned end-to-end system design — from REST API schema to production monitoring — increasing system reliability

footer.customNote: Building intelligent systems requires both rigorous engineering and clear purpose.

meta.shortIntro: Full Stack Developer with expertise in scalable backend services, modern frontend frameworks, and intelligent systems. Combining a strong academic background in AI/ML with practical experience in building robust applications.
meta.title: Full Stack Developer

items.description: Developed a backend inference service for real-time vehicle tracking using advanced models like YOLOv8 and DeepSORT, optimized for performance with NVIDIA TensorRT. The system features asynchronous task pipelines designed to reliably process high-frequency video streams even under challenging conditions such as occlusion and low-light.
items.projectName: Real-Time Object Detection and Multi-Object Tracking

items.description: Built a CNN-based image colorization agent, deployed through Flask APIs with asynchronous queueing to enable parallel inference. This project included a React UI for live image upload and visualization, achieving approximately 90% inference-time reduction through batch-optimized GPU scheduling.

Implemented secure backend services for a developer platform supporting over 1000 student users, featuring role-based authentication and robust REST APIs. The platform utilized a serverless architecture on AWS (Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, Route 53) to ensure 99.9% availability, complemented by a React-Redux frontend for interactive project management. An ETL-style log aggregation system was also integrated for usage analytics, with a dashboard built using Tableau and Javascript to visualize user activity trends.
items.projectName: TecRidge: A Developer Platform for Students to Explore and Collaborate
